provisions.content: The following holdings are hereby declared to be ripe for development— [Section 39] (1) The land at Dar-es-Salaam, shown edged in red on a plan deposited in the Office of the Commissioner for Surveys as registered plan 12982. (2) The land registered under Certificate of Title No. 186019/10 in the City of Dar-es-Salaam comprising an area of 44,617 square feet at the junction of Independence Avenue and Azikiwe Streets. [Sections 39 and 40] Plot numbers 876, 877, 878, 879, 884, 885, 886, 887, 888, 889, 890 and 891 all of Upanga Area, in the City of Dar es Salaam, shown edged in red on a plan deposited in the Office of Commissioner for Surveys as registered Plan Number 12984 1 . 1 G.N. No. 55 of 1965 The land at Kibara in the Ukerewe District, having an area of 625.7 acres and edged red on Registered Plan No. 13078 deposited in the Office of the Commissioner for Surveys 2 . 2 G.N. No. 122 of 1965 [Section 42] The land at Moshi in the Kilimanjaro District, known as Plot No. 12, Block "A" and shown edged red for identification purposes on Registered Plan No. 13848 deposited with the Commissioner for Surveys. Copies of the said plan may be inspected at the office of the Commissioner for Lands and the Regional Land Officer, Moshi.
